questions.stem_en: When driving in fog, which headlights should you use?
questions.stem_zhHant: 霧天駕駛時，應使用哪種車燈？
questions.explanation_en: In fog, use low-beam headlights. High beams reflect off the fog and make it harder to see.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 霧天行駛時使用近光燈。遠光燈會被霧反射，反而更難看清道路。

questions.stem_en: If visibility is extremely poor due to heavy fog, what should you do?
questions.stem_zhHant: 如果因大霧導致能見度極差，你應該怎麼做？

options.text_en: Turn on high beams and drive slowly
options.text_zhHant: 打開遠光燈並慢速行駛

options.text_en: Pull completely off the road, turn off driving lights, and turn on emergency flashers
options.text_zhHant: 將車完全駛離道路，關閉車燈，打開雙閃警示燈

options.text_en: Stop in the traffic lane and wait for fog to clear
options.text_zhHant: 在車道上停車等霧散去

options.text_en: Speed up to get through the fog quickly

questions.explanation_en: If visibility is very poor, pull completely off the road, turn off your driving lights, and turn on your emergency flashers.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 如果能見度非常差，將車完全駛離道路，關閉車燈，打開雙閃警示燈。

questions.stem_en: When driving in fog, what can you use as a guide to stay in your lane?
questions.stem_zhHant: 霧天駕駛時，你可以用什麼作為引導來保持車道？

options.text_en: The taillights of the car ahead
The right edge of the road or painted road markings
options.text_zhHant: 道路右側邊緣或路面標線

questions.explanation_en: Use the right edge of the road or painted road markings as a guide when driving in fog.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 霧天駕駛時，利用道路右側邊緣或路面標線作為引導。

questions.stem_en: What equipment should you use in foggy conditions to improve visibility?
questions.stem_zhHant: 在霧天條件下，應使用什麼設備來提高能見度？
questions.explanation_en: Use your defroster and windshield wipers in foggy conditions to improve visibility.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 霧天使用除霧器和雨刷器來提高能見度。

questions.stem_en: In heavy fog, what should you avoid doing?
questions.stem_zhHant: 在大霧中，你應該避免做什麼？
questions.explanation_en: Avoid crossing or passing traffic in heavy fog. Listen for traffic you cannot see.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 在大霧中避免橫穿或超越車輛。注意聽那些你看不到的車輛的聲音。

questions.stem_en: When is a road most slippery during rain?
questions.stem_zhHant: 雨天路面什麼時候最滑？

options.text_en: After several hours of heavy rain
During the first few minutes of rain

questions.explanation_en: The road is most slippery during the first few minutes of rain because oil on the road mixes with the water.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 下雨最初幾分鐘路面最滑，因為路面上的油污與水混合在一起。

questions.stem_en: What is hydroplaning?
questions.stem_zhHant: 什麼是水滑現象？

options.text_en: Your tires riding on a thin film of water, losing traction
options.text_zhHant: 輪胎在水膜上滑行，失去抓地力

options.text_en: Your windshield fogging up in rain
options.text_zhHant: 你的擋風玻璃在雨中起霧

questions.explanation_en: Hydroplaning occurs when your tires ride on a thin film of water at high speeds, causing you to lose traction and control.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 水滑現象是指高速行駛時，輪胎在水膜上滑行，導致失去抓地力和控制。

questions.stem_en: If your tires lose traction due to hydroplaning, what should you do?
questions.stem_zhHant: 如果你的輪胎因水滑而失去抓地力，你應該怎麼做？

options.text_en: Slow down gradually without hard braking or sudden turning
options.text_zhHant: 逐漸減速，不要急刹車或突然轉向
加速以重新獲得抓地力

questions.explanation_en: If your tires lose traction (hydroplaning), slow down gradually. Do not brake hard or turn suddenly.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 如果輪胎失去抓地力（水滑），逐漸減速。不要急刹車或突然轉向。

questions.stem_en: According to California law, when must you turn on your headlights?
questions.stem_zhHant: 根據加州法律，什麼時候必須打開前車燈？

options.text_en: When windshield wipers are in continuous use

questions.explanation_en: California law requires headlights when windshield wipers are in continuous use.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 加州法律要求在持續使用雨刷器時必須開啟前車燈。

questions.stem_en: Why should you never drive through flooded areas?
questions.stem_zhHant: 為什麼永遠不要駛入積水區域？

options.text_en: Even shallow water can cause you to lose control
options.text_zhHant: 即使淺水也可能導致你失控

options.text_en: It is only dangerous to motorcycles
Your insurance won't cover water damage
options.text_zhHant: 你的保險不會賠償水損

questions.explanation_en: Never drive through flooded areas. Even shallow water can cause you to lose control, and 6 inches of moving water can knock you down.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 不要駛入積水區域。即使淺水也可能導致你失控，6英寸深的流動水就足以使人摔倒。

questions.stem_en: When driving in the rain, where should you try to position your tires?
questions.stem_zhHant: 雨天駕駛時，你的輪胎應盡量放在什麼位置？

options.text_en: In the center of the lane
In the tire tracks of the car ahead of you

questions.explanation_en: Try to drive in the tire tracks of the car ahead of you, as there is less water accumulation in those tracks.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 盡量沿著前車的輪跡行駛，因為那裡積水較少。

questions.stem_en: When must you use your headlights?
questions.stem_zhHant: 什麼時候必須使用前車燈？

options.text_en: From 30 minutes after sunset to 30 minutes before sunrise
options.text_zhHant: 日落後30分鐘到日出前30分鐘

options.text_en: Only when it is completely dark

questions.explanation_en: Use your headlights from 30 minutes after sunset to 30 minutes before sunrise, and anytime conditions prevent you from seeing 1,000 feet ahead.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 日落後30分鐘到日出前30分鐘須開前車燈，以及任何無法看清前方1,000英尺的情況下也須開燈。

questions.stem_en: When must you switch to low-beam headlights at night?
questions.stem_zhHant: 夜間什麼時候必須切換到近光燈？

options.text_en: Within 500 feet of an oncoming vehicle or 300 feet of a vehicle you are following
options.text_zhHant: 距迎面來車500英尺以內或距你跟隨的車輛300英尺以內

questions.explanation_en: Use low-beam headlights within 500 feet of an oncoming vehicle or within 300 feet of a vehicle you are following.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 在距迎面來車500英尺以內或距你跟隨的車輛300英尺以內時，使用近光燈。

questions.stem_en: If an oncoming vehicle's high beams are blinding you, where should you look?
questions.stem_zhHant: 如果迎面來車的遠光燈使你目眩，你應該看向哪裡？

options.text_en: Directly at the oncoming vehicle's headlights
At the center of your lane
Toward the right edge of the road

questions.explanation_en: If an oncoming vehicle has blinding high beams, look toward the right edge of the road to avoid being blinded.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 如果迎面來車的遠光燈使你目眩，注視道路右側邊緣以避免被晃到。

questions.stem_en: How should you adjust your speed when driving at night?
questions.stem_zhHant: 夜間駕駛時應如何調整車速？

options.text_en: Drive at the posted speed limit
Drive so you can stop within the distance illuminated by your headlights
options.text_zhHant: 調整車速使你能在前車燈照亮的距離內停下車

options.text_en: Drive faster to reduce time on the road
options.text_zhHant: 開快些以減少在路上的時間

options.text_en: Maintain the same speed as daytime driving
options.text_zhHant: 保持與白天相同的速度

questions.explanation_en: Adjust your speed at night so you can stop within the distance illuminated by your headlights.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 夜間調整車速，使你能在前車燈照亮的距離內停下車。

questions.stem_en: Why should you NOT use high-beam headlights in fog, heavy rain, or snow?
questions.stem_zhHant: 為什麼不應該在霧天、大雨或下雪時使用遠光燈？

options.text_en: They use too much battery power
They can damage the headlight bulbs
The light reflects off precipitation and reduces visibility
options.text_zhHant: 光線會被雨雪反射，降低能見度

options.text_en: It is only a suggestion, not a rule

questions.explanation_en: Do not use high-beam headlights in fog, heavy rain, or snow. The light reflects off precipitation and reduces visibility.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 在霧天、大雨或下雪時不要使用遠光燈。光線會被雨雪反射，降低能見度。

questions.stem_en: If your brakes fail while driving, what should you do first?
questions.stem_zhHant: 如果駕駛時刹車失靈，你應該先做什麼？

options.text_en: Turn the steering wheel back and forth

questions.explanation_en: If your brakes fail, pump the brake pedal rapidly. If that doesn't work, use the parking brake gradually and shift to a lower gear.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 刹車失靈時，快速連踩刹車踏板。如果不起作用，逐漸拉起手刹。換入低擋減速。

questions.stem_en: What should you do if you have a tire blowout while driving?
questions.stem_zhHant: 如果駕駛時輪胎爆裂，你應該怎麼做？

options.text_en: Grip the steering wheel firmly, slow down gradually, and pull off the road
options.text_zhHant: 緊握方向盤，逐漸減速並將車駛離道路

questions.explanation_en: If you have a tire blowout, grip the steering wheel firmly, slow down gradually, and pull off the road. Do not brake suddenly.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 如果輪胎爆裂，緊握方向盤，逐漸減速並將車駛離道路。不要急刹車。

questions.stem_en: If your car starts to skid, what should you do?
questions.stem_zhHant: 如果車輛開始打滑，你應該怎麼做？

options.text_en: Brake firmly and steer in the opposite direction
options.text_zhHant: 用力踩刹車並向相反方向轉向

options.text_en: Accelerate to pull out of the skid
Ease off the gas and steer in the direction you want the front of the car to go
options.text_zhHant: 松開油門，將方向盤轉向你希望車頭朝向的方向

questions.explanation_en: If your car starts to skid, ease off the gas and steer in the direction you want the front of the car to go. Do not brake.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 如果車輛開始打滑，松開油門，將方向盤轉向你希望車頭朝向的方向。不要踩刹車。

questions.stem_en: If your accelerator (gas pedal) gets stuck, what should you do?
questions.stem_zhHant: 如果油門踏板卡住，你應該怎麼做？

options.text_en: Shift to neutral, apply brakes, and pull safely off the road
options.text_zhHant: 換入空擋，踩刹車，安全駛離道路

options.text_en: Open the car door and drag your foot on the ground
options.text_zhHant: 打開車門用腳拖地減速

questions.explanation_en: If your accelerator sticks, shift to neutral, apply the brakes, and pull safely off the road.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 如果油門踏板卡住，換入空擋，踩刹車，安全駛離道路。

questions.stem_en: What should you do if your vehicle stalls on railroad tracks?
questions.stem_zhHant: 如果你的車輛在鐵軌上熄火，你應該怎麼做？

options.text_en: Try to restart the engine repeatedly
Wait in the car for help
Get everyone out immediately and move away from the tracks
options.text_zhHant: 立即讓所有人下車並遠離鐵軌

options.text_en: Push the car off the tracks by yourself

questions.explanation_en: If your vehicle stalls on railroad tracks, get everyone out immediately and move away from the tracks. Call 911 or the emergency number posted at the crossing.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 如果車輛在鐵軌上熄火，立即讓所有人下車並遠離鐵軌。撥打911或道口處張貼的緊急電話。

questions.stem_en: If your vehicle breaks down on the freeway, what should you do to signal for help?
questions.stem_zhHant: 如果你的車輛在高速公路上拋錨，你應該怎樣發出求助信號？

options.text_en: Stand in the traffic lane and wave
Raise the hood or tie a white cloth to the antenna
options.text_zhHant: 打開引擎蓋或在天線上系白布

questions.explanation_en: If your vehicle breaks down on the freeway, pull completely off the road. Raise the hood or tie a white cloth to the antenna.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 如果車輛在高速公路上拋錨，將車完全駛離道路。打開引擎蓋或在天線上系白布。

questions.stem_en: If your headlights suddenly go out while driving, what should you do?
questions.stem_zhHant: 如果駕駛時前車燈突然熄滅，你應該怎麼做？

options.text_en: Try the headlight switch, slow down, and pull off the road
options.text_zhHant: 嘗試開關燈光開關，減速並將車駛離道路

options.text_en: Speed up to reach a lighted area
options.text_zhHant: 加速駛向有照明的區域

questions.explanation_en: If your headlights suddenly go out, try the headlight switch. Slow down and pull off the road.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 如果前車燈突然熄滅，嘗試開關燈光開關。減速並將車駛離道路。

questions.stem_en: When should you install tire chains on your vehicle?
questions.stem_zhHant: 什麼時候應該在車輛上安裝防滑鏈？

options.text_en: When required by signs or CalTrans
options.text_zhHant: 當標誌或加州交通局要求時

questions.explanation_en: Install chains on your drive wheels when required by signs or CalTrans. Carry chains when driving in mountain areas during winter.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 當標誌或加州交通局要求時，在驅動輪上安裝防滑鏈。冬季在山區行駛時攜帶防滑鏈。

questions.stem_en: Which road surfaces tend to freeze before others?
questions.stem_zhHant: 哪些路面比其他路面更早結冰？
questions.explanation_en: Bridges and overpasses freeze before other road surfaces.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 橋梁和高架橋面比其他路面更早結冰。

questions.stem_en: How much should you increase your following distance on icy or snowy roads?
questions.stem_zhHant: 在冰雪路面上，你應該將跟車距離增加多少？
questions.explanation_en: Increase following distance to 3-4 times the normal distance on icy or snowy roads.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 在冰雪路面上將跟車距離增加到正常距離的3到4倍。

questions.stem_en: If you start to slide on ice, what should you do?
questions.stem_zhHant: 如果你在冰面上開始打滑，你應該怎麼做？

options.text_en: Brake hard to stop the slide
Gently ease off the accelerator and avoid sudden braking or steering
options.text_zhHant: 輕輕松開油門，避免突然刹車或轉向
加速以重新獲得抓地力

options.text_en: Turn the steering wheel sharply in the opposite direction
options.text_zhHant: 將方向盤急轉向相反方向

questions.explanation_en: If you start to slide on ice, gently ease off the accelerator and avoid sudden braking or steering movements.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 如果在冰面上開始打滑，輕輕松開油門，避免突然刹車或轉向。

questions.stem_en: When driving downhill on slippery surfaces, what should you do to maintain control?
questions.stem_zhHant: 在濕滑路面下坡時，你應該怎麼做以保持控制？
questions.explanation_en: Use lower gears to maintain better control when driving downhill on slippery surfaces.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 在濕滑路面下坡時使用低擋位以保持更好的控制力。
